issues.title: Remove deprecations from 1.0.0-M6
issues.body:
- [x] Remove deprecations from models, vector store and usage: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2264
- [x] Remove deprecated FunctionCallback references and replace them with ToolCall updates : https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2265

issues.title: Remove deprecated FunctionCalling API references
issues.body: Remove all the deprecations and references of Function Calling APIs and replace them with ToolCalling.
